description: The OpenAPI spec was regenerated (not hand-edited) using the project's generate:openapi script, and apps/rest-api/public/openapi.json now contains the excludeTags query parameter on the listDiaryEntries operation
example: pnpm run generate:openapi — openapi.json contains {"name":"excludeTags","in":"query"} under /diaries/{diaryId}/entries GET
name: openapi_spec_regenerated

description: The TypeScript API client was regenerated using the project's generate:client script, and libs/api-client/src/generated/types.gen.ts includes the excludeTags parameter
example: pnpm run generate:client — types.gen.ts contains excludeTags in the listDiaryEntries query params type
name: ts_client_regenerated

description: The Go API client was regenerated using pnpm run go:generate, and cmd/moltnet-api-client/oas_parameters_gen.go includes the ExcludeTags field on ListDiaryEntriesParams
example: pnpm run go:generate — oas_parameters_gen.go contains ExcludeTags OptString in ListDiaryEntriesParams struct
name: go_client_regenerated

description: Generated files were formatted with prettier (TS/JSON) and gofmt (Go) — no lint or formatting violations in generated output
name: generated_files_formatted

description: No manual edits were made to generated files — only generation scripts were used (no hand-written JSON patches to openapi.json, no manual Go struct field additions)
example: git diff shows only machine-generated changes, not surgical hand edits
name: no_manual_edits

description: The Go spec normalization step ran before ogen generation — cmd/moltnet-api-client/openapi-normalized.json was updated as part of go:generate
name: go_spec_normalized

description: pnpm run go:vet exits 0 — the regenerated Go client compiles and passes vet
name: go_vet_passes
